definition: The first jhāna in the standard fourfold sequence of ariya sammā samādhi.
notes: Use this record for the first member of ariya sammā samādhi. The repository keeps mental theme so the term stays tied to practical theme-taking rather than drifting into absorption or trance language. Keep the first member coordinated with vitakka and vicāra as thinking and pondering.

example_phrases.notes: First member of the standard fourfold sequence.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the first member of the fourfold path expression of ariya sammā samādhi.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not recast as first absorption or first trance. Use first jhāna only where a controlled technical reason calls for the Pali.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the first member from drifting away from practical path handling and the vitakka-vicāra pair.
